006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.util.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
027
028/**
029 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link SseParser}.
030 *
031 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
032 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
033 * </ul>
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
036 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SseBasics">SSE Basics</a>
037 * </ul>
038 */
039@SuppressWarnings({
040   "java:S110",   // Inheritance depth acceptable for session hierarchy
041   "java:S115",   // Match AssertionUtils arg-name style used throughout Juneau.
042   "unchecked",   // Type erasure: SseEvent/List<SseEvent> returned via Object cast
043   "resource"     // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
044})
045public class SseParserSession extends ReaderParserSession implements RecordReadable {
046
047   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
048
049   /**
050    * Builder class.
051    */
052   public static class Builder extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
053
054      /**
055       * Constructor.
056       *
057       * @param ctx The context creating this session. Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
058       */
059      protected Builder(SseParser ctx) {
060         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
061      }
062
063      @Override
064      public SseParserSession build() {
065         return new SseParserSession(this);
066      }
067   }
068
069   /**
070    * Creates a new builder for this object.
071    *
072    * @param ctx The context creating this session. Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
073    * @return A new builder.
074    */
075   public static Builder create(SseParser ctx) {
076      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
077   }
078
079   /**
080    * Constructor.
081    *
082    * @param builder The builder for this object.
083    */
084   protected SseParserSession(Builder builder) {
085      super(builder);
086   }
087
088   @Override /* RecordReadable */
089   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
090      return RecordAdapter.arrayReader(this, input);
091   }
092
093   @Override /* RecordReadable */
094   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
095      return false;
096   }
097
098   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
099   @SuppressWarnings({
100      "java:S2095" // Reader is owned by ParserPipe and closed via SseEventReader in try-with-resources.
101   })
102   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException {
103      var r = pipe.getReader();
104      if (r == null)
105         return null;
106      List<SseEvent> events;
107      try (var r2 = new SseEventReader(r)) {
108         events = r2.toList();
109      }
110      if (type == null || type.isObject() || type.isCollectionOrArray()) {
111         if (type != null && type.isArray())
112            return (T) events.toArray(new SseEvent[0]);
113         return (T) events;
114      }
115      if (SseEvent.class.equals(type.inner())) {
116         return events.isEmpty() ? null : (T) events.get(0);
117      }
118      if (List.class.isAssignableFrom(type.inner()))
119         return (T) events;
120      throw new ParseException(this, "SseParser cannot produce target type ''{0}''.", type);
121   }
122}
